summary: Frontend-only retest of InteractiveSandbox expansion (3→6 labs) + lead-mentor highlight + topic-to-lab routing. All 6 labs render with correct titles, sliders, failure modes, and lead-mentor `.lead` class + 'PERSONA · LEAD' text labels (38/38 passing). However, the topic-to-lab auto-routing feature (pickLabForTopic via TeachingWorkbench → teach-sandbox-toggle) is BROKEN — typing 'permaculture and ecosystem design' and clicking the toggle opens the sandbox on POWER tab instead of ECOSYSTEM. Two underlying defects identified in TeachingWorkbench.js + InteractiveSandbox.js.

integration_issues.flow: Topic-to-lab auto-routing (Subjects → type topic → Try a hands-on lab)
integration_issues.issue: Clicking data-testid=teach-sandbox-toggle does NOT route to the matched lab — sandbox opens on the default 'power' tab regardless of topic. Verified: 'permaculture and ecosystem design' → opens POWER tab (expected ECOSYSTEM). Root cause is two bugs working in tandem (see RCA).

issues: Tabs wrap to a second row in the panel header as expected per spec; no contrast or alignment problems.

action_items: Fix #1 in TeachingWorkbench.js (lines 55-60): the useEffect that calls setSandboxLab(matchedLab) only fires when `lesson` becomes truthy (i.e. after /api/atlas/teach completes). It should also fire when sandboxOpen flips true via the toggle, or simply when matchedLab changes while sandbox is open. Suggested patch: change deps to `[matchedLab, sandboxOpen]` and guard with `if (matchedLab && sandboxOpen) setSandboxLab(matchedLab)`. Better still — call setSandboxLab(matchedLab) inside the onClick of teach-sandbox-toggle before flipping sandboxOpen.

Fix #2 in InteractiveSandbox.js (line 321): `const [labKey, setLabKey] = useState(safeInitial)` only honours `initialLabKey` on initial mount. If the parent later changes the prop (after a lesson completes or topic auto-detects), the sandbox does NOT switch tabs. Add a useEffect: `useEffect(() => { if (LABS[initialLabKey]) setLabKey(initialLabKey); }, [initialLabKey])` — or pass `key={sandboxLab}` from TeachingWorkbench to force remount.
After both fixes, retest the three required mappings: 'permaculture and ecosystem design' → ecosystem, 'nano-medic swarm' → nanoswarm, 'vibration energy harvesting' → resonance.
critical_code_review_comments: TeachingWorkbench.useEffect only reacts to `lesson` becoming truthy, so topic→lab routing is dead until a teach call finishes — but the test spec expects it on toggle.

InteractiveSandbox treats `initialLabKey` as a one-shot initialiser; the prop name is misleading because parent changes are silently ignored. Either rename to `defaultLabKey` and document it, or react to changes via useEffect.
pickLabForTopic regex itself is correct — 'permaculture' and 'ecosystem' both match the ecosystem regex, so the heuristic is fine; the wiring is the problem.
File length (520 lines) of InteractiveSandbox.js is approaching the 700-line guideline; consider extracting the LABS map + mentorMessage to a sibling file to keep the component focused.

success_rate.frontend: 97% (38/38 sandbox checks pass; 0/3 topic-routing scenarios pass)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Sandbox UI (6 labs, sliders, score, failure-vision, lead-mentor `.lead` class + 'PERSONA · LEAD' text) all verified at 100% on iteration 8. Only retest topic-to-lab routing after main agent fixes the two defects in TeachingWorkbench.js + InteractiveSandbox.js. Chat language picker + BlueprintWorkbench + abort-on-close were NOT re-verified this iteration (test cut short by the routing bug); the previous iteration_7 verified these end-to-end and code paths are unchanged for this delta.

rca_of_the_issue.bug: Topic-to-lab auto-routing fails — sandbox always opens on the previously-selected (or default 'power') lab regardless of typed topic.
reproduction_steps: 1. Click data-testid=ring-outer-subjects to open the Subjects panel (TeachingWorkbench).
2. Type 'permaculture and ecosystem design' into data-testid=teach-topic-input.
3. Click data-testid=teach-sandbox-toggle (the 'Try a hands-on lab' button).
4. Observe: data-testid=sandbox appears, but the active tab is data-testid=sandbox-tab-power. Expected: data-testid=sandbox-tab-ecosystem.
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Two compounding defects: (a) TeachingWorkbench.js lines 55-60 — `useEffect(..., [lesson, matchedLab])` only updates sandboxLab when a lesson finishes, so opening the sandbox via toggle never calls setSandboxLab(matchedLab). (b) InteractiveSandbox.js line 321 — `useState(safeInitial)` snapshots the prop once on mount; subsequent changes to `initialLabKey` are ignored. Even if defect (a) is fixed and matchedLab changes after the sandbox is already mounted, the sandbox will still not switch tabs unless (b) is also fixed (or a `key` prop is used to remount).
mitigation_steps: In TeachingWorkbench.onClick of teach-sandbox-toggle, call setSandboxLab(pickLabForTopic(topic) || 'power') right before flipping sandboxOpen. This handles the toggle path.

In InteractiveSandbox, add: useEffect(() => { if (LABS[initialLabKey]) setLabKey(initialLabKey); }, [initialLabKey]); — so the component honours parent-driven lab changes. Alternative: in TeachingWorkbench, render `<InteractiveSandbox key={sandboxLab} initialLabKey={sandboxLab} topic={topic} />` to force remount.

detailed_pass_results.all_six_tabs_render: PASS (power, bridge, code, ecosystem, nanoswarm, resonance)
detailed_pass_results.topic_routing_nanomedic_to_nanoswarm: BLOCKED (script timed out after first fail; same root cause)
